2012 public art

Public Contact

Public unannounced performance. SIDance – Seoul International Dance Festival, Seoul, 2012. Concept, directing: Boris Oicherman, Nilesh and Ida Grändås-Rhee. Performers: Sturina Yi, Hong Seok Jang, Natalie Kim, Nausika Kim, Seyul Ahn. Photography: Boris Oicherman, Maria Teresa Bilotta and Eric Reeder
